allow: Bash(python -c "from pathlib import Path; d=Path\('data'\); [print\(f'{p.name}: {p.stat\(\).st_size/1e6:.1f} MB, {p.stat\(\).st_size//2:,} tokens'\) for p in sorted\(d.glob\('*.bin'\)\)]")
